case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. WYVONNA JACKSON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ANGIE C. HONG RE: CCP 585 DEC -IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-07-2007 CONTINUED TO MAR-07-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, WYVONNA AN INDIVIDUAL $2,287.86 PRINCIPAL, $227.27 ATTORNEY FEES, $438.48 INTEREST, $229.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,182.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
